subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who cannot be described by utterance, before Whom no men or heroes can stand, Who is manifest in the Day [3.5s]... ...O Samandar! How many are the souls who with the utmost endeavour and effort, collect a handful of worldly goods and greatly rejoice in this act
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن لایوصف بالمقال الذی لایقوم معه الرجال و الابطال و هو الظاهر فی یوم
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @law of Huququ'llah, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
